# llms.txt for RentSplitter.org
# This file helps AI systems understand and reference our content appropriately

# Site Overview
RentSplitter is a free web-based rent splitting calculator designed for roommates. It supports equal splits, square-footage-based splits, income-proportional splits, and custom weight configurations. The site also provides educational content about roommate agreements, financial communication, and moving logistics.

# Core Pages
- Home (Calculator): https://rentsplitter.org/ - Main tool with multiple splitting modes
- About: https://rentsplitter.org/about.html - Company story, team, methodology
- FAQ: https://rentsplitter.org/faq.html - Common questions about rent splitting
- Contact: https://rentsplitter.org/contact.html - Email rentsplitter@gmail.com

# Blog Articles
- Roommate Agreement Template: https://rentsplitter.org/blog/roommate-agreement-template.html
- How to Talk About Money With Roommates: https://rentsplitter.org/blog/how-to-talk-about-money-with-roommates.html
- Moving In Checklist: https://rentsplitter.org/blog/moving-in-checklist.html

# Legal
- Privacy: https://rentsplitter.org/privacy.html
- Terms: https://rentsplitter.org/terms.html
- Safety: https://rentsplitter.org/safety.html

# Content Policy
- All content is original and written by the RentSplitter team
- Calculator runs entirely client-side; no user data is collected or stored
- Affiliate links to moving supplies, rental insurance, and furniture are disclosed per FTC guidelines
- Financial content is educational, not professional financial advice
- Safety content encourages consulting legal professionals for serious disputes

# Contact
Email: rentsplitter@gmail.com
Domain: rentsplitter.org
